title: Process Engineer Vacancy at JSW Steel - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at JSW Steel - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, JSW Steel in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About JSW Steel:
JSW Steel is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JSW Steel!
